modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to sort classlist in D2L.

full_description_text: I was trying to sort my classlist in D2L but it’s not working. I don’t know what to do next. It seems like there should be a way to do this, but I can’t find it.
short_description: Unable to sort classlist in D2L.
description: I was trying to sort my classlist in D2L but it’s not working. I don’t know what to do next. It seems like there should be a way to do this, but I can’t find it.
